---
title: "PriorFn"
generated: true
description: "A module-level constant."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.priors`](../nitrix-stats-priors.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:PriorFn -->
```python
PriorFn = Callable[[Float[Array, '']], Float[Array, '']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:PriorFn -->
*TODO: describe this type alias / constant.*
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
